title: Yennachu Yedhachu Lyrics Trisha Illana Nayanthara
stanzas:
ennachu edhaachu
yedhedho aayachu
kaanadha kannukulla
kaadhal ippo kankaatchi.

poovachu ponnachu
poo nenju punnachu
nee thotta neram
 ippo neruppa aachu
en moochu

un nenapula naan vaada
en usurula nee thaeda
mazhai veyilena
paakka venaam
mayangida vaadi manasoda

nadu iravila aal illa
thudi thudikiren vaa mella
idhu varai naan paathathilla
iruttukulla ada ivan tholla

kannil nee vandhu kadhai pesa
kanavil unnala siricheney
ulagam ellame thaduthaalum
unakku thunaiyaaga irupeney

un aasai naan
en aasai nee
peraasai aavoma
kan moodiye kai koorthu thaan
kaanaamal povoma

anbe un kangal rendum
en kaadhal kannadi.
suriya kan paarkum munne
nee vaada munnadi.

ennodu nee unnodu naan
verenna sandhegam
kaiyodu vaa pinnikolla
neethaanda sandhosam

nammodu yaarum illa
vekkam enna vekkam enna
ennodu naane illa
 enna panna enna panna

paavada raatinam pole
nee enna suthaadha
un meesai mullalale nee
rosaavai kuthatha

ennachu edhaachu
yedhedho aayachu
kaanadha kannukulla
kaadhal ippo kankaatchi.

poovachu ponnachu
poo nenju punnachu
nee thotta neram
 ippo neruppa aachu
en moochu

un nenapula naan vaada
en usurula nee thaeda
mazhai veyilena
paakka venaam
mayangida vaadi manasoda

nadu iravila aal illa
thudi thudikiren vaa mella
idhu varai naan paathathilla
iruttukulla ada ivan tholla

kannil nee vandhu kadhai pesa
kanavil unnala siricheney
ulagam ellame thaduthaalum
unakku thunaiyaaga irupeney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Yennachu Yedhachu explores themes of love and longing, expressing the emotions of being infatuated and the joy of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Trisha Illana Nayanthara, this song highlights the playful and romantic interactions between the lead characters, enhancing the film's light-hearted narrative.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was the song released?

Yennachu Yedhachu was released on September 17, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yennachu Yedhachu, the playful lyrics and lively melody encapsulate the essence of young love, making it a standout track in Trisha Illana Nayanthara. The song conveys a sense of joy and excitement, reflecting the carefree moments shared between the protagonists. With its upbeat rhythm, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, perfect for romantic occasions. This duet showcases the chemistry between the singers, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennachu Yedhachu from Trisha Illana Nayanthara is a vibrant celebration of love, blending the enchanting vocals of GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi. This catchy duet captures the essence of youthful romance, making it a perfect addition to any playlist. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings together heartfelt lyrics and an upbeat melody.
stanzaMeanings: What happened, what is happening, love is now a visual experience in the eyes that cannot see.
The flower, the girl, the flower heart, now the time you touched has become fire in my breath.
In your thoughts, I sing, in my life, you are the rain; I don't want to see the sunlight, don't get lost in your mind.
There is no one in the middle of the road; I am just playing around. Until now, I haven't seen anything in the darkness, oh this guy is a nuisance.
When you come into my eyes, you tell a story; even if the world is against you, I will always be with you.
Your desire is my desire; will we become one? If we close our eyes, will we leave without seeing?
When everyone sleeps, love doesn't bring sleep in the eyes.
When true love comes, it doesn't look at the situation.
My love, your two eyes are my love mirror. Before the sun sees, you should sing ahead.
With me, you and I, what is the doubt? Come, hold my hand, you are my happiness.
There is no one with us, what is the fuss? What should I do, what should I do, if I am not there?
Like a nightgown, you are not pure; your mustache is like a thorn, you are not a rose.
What happened, what is happening, love is now a visual experience in the eyes that cannot see.
The flower, the girl, the flower heart, now the time you touched has become fire in my breath.
In your thoughts, I sing, in my life, you are the rain; I don't want to see the sunlight, don't get lost in your mind.
There is no one in the middle of the road; I am just playing around. Until now, I haven't seen anything in the darkness, oh this guy is a nuisance.
When you come into my eyes, you tell a story; even if the world is against you, I will always be with you.
